name: cogni-works
description: Open-source Claude Code plugins for knowledge work — consulting, B2B sales, and marketing.

plugins.name: cogni-claims
plugins.description: Claim verification and management system. Verifies sourced claims against cited URLs, detects deviations, and guides users through resolution.

plugins.name: cogni-obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian integration for Claude Code workplaces. Scaffolds vaults with Terminal plugin, manages cross-platform terminal profiles, and enables cogni-x plugins to work collaboratively through an Obsidian-based environment.

plugins.name: cogni-narrative
plugins.description: Story arc-driven narrative transformation. Transforms research syntheses and structured content into compelling executive narratives using 6 story arc frameworks including TIPS-native trend panorama. Includes narrative review scoring and derivative format adaptation.

plugins.name: cogni-copywriting
plugins.description: Professional copywriting toolkit with messaging frameworks (BLUF, Pyramid, SCQA, STAR), stakeholder review, readability optimization, and multi-language support.

plugins.name: cogni-workspace
plugins.description: Lean workspace orchestrator for cogni-works marketplace plugins. Manages shared foundation (env vars, settings), theme management, plugin discovery, and workspace health.
